category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides a library and tools to parse and encode WBXML documents.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides libwbxml; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo identify the official libwbxml repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository; its README is the primary official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies WBXML parsing and encoding; source_facts.executables lists wbxml2xml and xml2wbxml.
